== Notes for [[Item:Q85047|Q85047]] ==

* Wilaadat (Birth): 48 AH (669 AD)
* Wafaat (Death): 117 AH (736 AD)

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sakinah_(Fatema_Kubra)_bint_Husayn

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Qasim_ibn_Hasan

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fatema_Sugra_bint_Husayn

--------------------
* Wilaadat (Birth:
* Wafaat (Death):

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Fatema_Sugra_bint_Husayn
--------------------
* Wilaadat (Birth:
* Wafaat (Death):

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sakinah_(Fatema_Kubra)_bint_Husayn

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
